assumption_text: The episode is bounded to the objective area, crash sites, and rescue corridor rather than all of Mogadishu.
rationale: Whole-city denominators are impermissibly broad for this short battle.

assumption_text: Somali dead are retained as unknown-status mixed fatalities unless a source explicitly separates civilians from fighters.
rationale: The prompt forbids silent status allocation.

assumption_text: Neither the fewer-than-200 initial assault figure nor the more-than-400 task-force figure is treated as a valid full-battle opposed-combatant denominator.
rationale: Those figures refer to only part of the engaged force picture and would create a false precision DR.
